ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment used for the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., simulation, real-world) */,
  "total_epochs" INTEGER /* Total number of epochs planned for the experiment */,
  "current_epoch" INTEGER /* Current epoch number to track progress */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the experiment results are public or private */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., simulation, real-world) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the environment */,
  "environment_size" TEXT /* Size of the environment (e.g., number of agents, map dimensions) */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the environment */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Level of complexity of the environment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "epoch_idx" INTEGER /* Index of the epoch */,
  "policy_loss" REAL /* Policy loss for the epoch */,
  "advantage_norm" REAL /* Normalized advantage for the epoch */,
  "rollout_prob_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of rollout probabilities */,
  "frames" INTEGER /* Number of frames in the epoch */,
  "model_prob_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of model probabilities */,
  "policy_entropy" REAL /* Policy entropy for the epoch */,
  "policy_gradient_loss" REAL /* Policy gradient loss for the epoch */,
  "policy_gradient_bias_correction" REAL /* Bias correction for policy gradient */,
  "P09_episode_rewards" REAL /* 90th percentile of episode rewards */,
  "grad_norm" REAL /* Gradient norm for the epoch */,
  "avg_q_selected" REAL /* Average Q-value selected */,
  "avg_q_retraced" REAL /* Average Q-value retraced */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second (FPS) during the epoch */,
  "episode_length" INTEGER /* Length of episodes in the epoch */,
  "explained_variance" INTEGER /* Explained variance for the epoch */,
  "PMM_episode_rewards" REAL /* Modal mean of episode rewards */,
  "P01_episode_rewards" REAL /* 10th percentile of episode rewards */,
  "q_loss" REAL /* Q-value loss for the epoch */,
  "reward_mean" REAL /* Mean of the rewards for the epoch */,
  "reward_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the rewards for the epoch */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of successful episodes in the epoch */,
  "episode_max_reward" REAL /* Maximum reward achieved in any episode of the epoch */,
  "episode_min_reward" REAL /* Minimum reward achieved in any episode of the epoch */,
  "action_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of actions taken during the epoch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "param_group" TEXT /* Group to which the parameter belongs (e.g., training, model) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., bug fix, feature addition, performance improvement) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
